calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-31-2018 Continued To Feb-14-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Scott Bassin for Eric Rosen (Petitioner).

Mr. Bassin stated that he e-filed a declaration yesterday addressing the Examiner's notes, that he could not get an endorsed copy, that no beneficiaries are incarcerated or jailed, and that he filed the original bank statements in person. The Second Amended Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to February 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Continued To Jan-31-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-20-2017 Continued To Jan-10-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-22-2017 Continued To Dec-20-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-17-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Final Accounting And Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-17-2017 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-19-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Scott Bassin for Eric Rosen.

The Court questions why this has taken this long and what's being done. Mr. Bassin stated that the property had many years of accumulation of debris, that escrow is pending, that he did a notice of proposed action, that escrow is set to close on August 2nd and that the buyer may come back with issues regarding repairs. The Court allows the Petition for Approval of Status Report (subject to review of the order) and continues administration of the Estate to October 17, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-06-2017 Continued To Jul-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-06-2017 Continued To Jun-20-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-23-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-25-2017 Continued To May-23-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Scott Bassin for Eric Rosen (Executor).

Mr. Bassin stated that his Client is in Australia and that he sent the petition for approval of status report to him for signature last week. Status on close of Estate is continued to May 23, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Order to Appear is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-25-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-21-2017 Continued To Apr-25-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on April 25, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Status Report has not been filed. Status on close of Estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
